name: @tetherto/wdk-wallet-evm-erc-4337
description: A simple package to manage BIP-32 wallets for evm blockchains, which implement the erc-4337 standard and its account abstraction features
author: Tether

scripts.test:integration-wait: wait-on http://localhost:8545 && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest tests/integration --forceExit
scripts.test:integration-wait:coverage: wait-on http://localhost:8545 && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest tests/integration --coverage --forceExit
scripts.test:integration: concurrently -k -s first -n "NODE,TEST" -c "black,green" --hide NODE "npx hardhat node" "npm run test:integration-wait"
scripts.test:integration:coverage: concurrently -k -s first -n "NODE,TEST" -c "black,green" --hide NODE "npx hardhat node" "npm run test:integration-wait:coverage"
